# Test Catalog — Clinical Co-Pilot

This catalog lists every test in the sidecar (`agent/copilot-api/`),
auto-generated from each test module's docstring. It is the index a
future agent reads to answer in <60s:

- "What tests exist for the verifier?"
- "Which case catches Wk1 regression AgDR-NNNN?"
- "Where would I add a test for a new extractor?"

See Plan §15.5.12 (test catalog freshness) and `documentation-framework-v1`
skill for the discipline this catalog enforces.

## Last regenerated

2026-05-09 — Workstream 0 scaffold (initial catalog; populated by Teams A/B/C).

*Populated by Workstream A/B/C. Each file gets one heading + first-line summary.*

*Populated by Workstream A/B/C.*

*Populated by Workstream C.*

## L5 — Live-vendor smoke (`evals/live_smoke/`)

*Populated by Workstream C. Never PR-blocking.*

## Pre-Wk2 (Wk1) tests still in scope

These tests live at `tests/test_*.py` (not yet migrated under `tests/unit/`)
and remain part of the L1 layer:

- `tests/test_auth.py` — gateway-secret + task-token auth.
- `tests/test_llm_default_model.py` — default model resolution.
- `tests/test_observability.py` — Langfuse PHI scrubbing.
- `tests/test_schemas.py` — Wk1 Pydantic shape round-trips.
- `tests/test_verifier.py` — Wk1 18 verifier rules.

Wk2 introduces the `tests/unit/` layout per Plan §15.5.1 and migrates
these incrementally as Teams A/B/C add new tests.
